Relevant Modules: DSA, Intro to OOP (Java), Comp Architecture

NOTABLE PROJECTS | FULL PORTFOLIO: WEBSITE

Reverse-engineered the Bluetooth packets using Wireshark, then implemented into application
Solved the issue of not being able to control the "CMF Earbuds" on desktop platforms
Tech: Flutter & Dart, Wireshark, ADB

Real-time sync across multiple devices & platforms
Implemented conflict resolution algorithms & used containerized & redundant deployment

TECHNICAL SKILLS

Miscellaneous: AWS & GCP, Linux/Unix Server Provisioning, CI/CD, Neovim

Homelabbing, Cooking & Cuisine, Hiking & Rambling
